review_reason: Architectural blocker: staged construction always adds density intermediates using DN axiom, making discreteness proofs impossible without new infrastructure

artifacts.summary: BLOCKED - discovered staged construction architecture prevents discreteness proofs

partial_progress.details: Phase 4 blocked: buildStagedTimeline adds density witnesses at odd stages via density_of_canonicalR, which uses DN axiom. No separate discrete construction exists. Three sorries require proving discreteness but staged construction makes timeline potentially dense.

errors.message: DiscreteTimelineQuot uses same buildStagedTimeline as dense case. density_of_canonicalR (CanonicalTimeline.lean:134) applies DN axiom universally. No discrete staged construction exists.
errors.recommendation: Choose: (A) Prove density witnesses collapse in quotient (4-8h), (B) Create discrete staged construction (3-5h), or (C) Alternative proof strategy bypassing staged construction

completion_data.completion_summary: Discovered architectural blocker in Phase 4: staged construction (buildStagedTimeline) adds density intermediates at all odd stages using DN axiom. No separate discrete construction exists. The 3 remaining sorries (discrete_timeline_lt_succFn, discrete_timeline_predFn_lt, IsSuccArchimedean) cannot be proven without architectural changes.
